applied_optimizations.name: torch.compile with inductor tuning
applied_optimizations.description: Applied torch.compile(mode='default') with coordinate_descent_tuning, unique_kernel_names, and epilogue_fusion enabled. This fuses elementwise operations (logsumexp, sigmoid, mul, div, add, clamp, sub) into a single Triton kernel.

attempted_but_failed.name: Manual Triton kernel for logsumexp + elementwise
attempted_but_failed.reason: Manual Triton kernel with 15.7M threads (one per output position) was 3.4x slower than baseline (13.2ms vs 4.06ms). The overhead of launching millions of tiny kernels outweighed any fusion benefits.

attempted_but_failed.name: ROCm environment variables (GPU_MAX_HW_QUEUES, PYTORCH_TUNABLEOP_ENABLED, etc.)
attempted_but_failed.reason: No measurable improvement, slight regression (3.28ms vs 3.26ms)

top_bottlenecks: batched_transpose (37.6%) - data layout changes from ConvTranspose3d
MIOpen ConvTranspose (29.5%) - already optimized by vendor library
triton_per_fused elementwise kernel (20.5%) - already fused by torch.compile

notes: torch.compile fuses logsumexp + sigmoid + mul + div + add + clamp + sub into single Triton kernel (triton_per_fused_add_clamp_div_logsumexp_mul_sigmoid_sub)
Main bottleneck is transpose overhead (37.6%) from ConvTranspose3d internal data layout changes - this is hard to optimize without changing the conv implementation itself
Manual Triton kernels with fine-grained parallelism (one thread per output position) performed poorly due to kernel launch overhead

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trials 2, 3, and 4 all crashed with no output. The agent is failing during code generation. Need extremely minimal, explicit instructions to avoid crashes and build on the working 62.30 score.

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 5 crashed with no output — this is the 4th consecutive crash (trials 2-5). The agent needs an extremely explicit, minimal diff from the working solution. Providing near-complete code to avoid co
